statement: Resumed work re-anchors merge and completion claims to live repository state before any downstream action.
revisit_when: A resumed session acts on a summary claim before checking its live anchor, or after 20 observed resumptions.

failure_chain.prompting_event: A compaction summary stated that a release branch had merged.
failure_chain.target_failure: Deployment work begins from a branch state that does not exist.
failure_chain.consequences: Time loss and a false-DONE report.
failure_chain.earliest_interruptible_link: Before accepting the summary's merge claim.
failure_chain.replacement_behavior: Run continuity-verify and anchor the merge claim to git or PR state.
failure_chain.rehearsal_fixture: A resume fixture whose summary claims merge while GITLOG shows an unmerged branch.
